Operation 'getChatExploreStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is identical to summary and lacks essential details. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and how it fits into the Chat Explore workflow.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve Chat Explore analysis task status
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status of an asynchronous Chat Explore task. Provide the task_id returned from the initial Chat Explore request. Returns a TaskStatusResponse containing the task's current state (pending, processing, completed, or failed) and any relevant status information. Use this to poll for task completion before retrieving results.
data.reasoning: Original description is identical to summary and lacks essential details. Improved version explains: (1) this is for async task monitoring, (2) what parameter is needed and where it comes from, (3) what the response contains and possible states, (4) the typical workflow pattern (poll before getting results). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and how it fits into the Chat Explore workflow.

message: Operation 'getChatExploreResult' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the results of a completed Chat Explore conversational analysis task. Provide the task_id from the initial Chat Explore request. Results are typically available for a limited time after task completion.
